context_notes: Phase 5 is the final phase of v1.0 milestone. This session completed: (1) research via gsd-phase-researcher — HIGH confidence, all patterns from existing codebase, (2) VALIDATION.md with Nyquist test map, (3) security gate passed (ASVS L1 active), (4) UI gate cleared (not a frontend phase). The planner agent spawn was rejected by user who then ran /gsd-stats and /gsd-update to v1.34.2. Planning needs to resume from step 8 of the plan-phase workflow.
